---
title: "201511150161王祖正线性模型作业"
output: word_document
---

```{r cars}
library(mvtnorm)
library(MASS)
fdata<-function(i,k)
{
  x<-mvrnorm(k,rep(0,6),diag(6))
  e<-rnorm(k,0,2)
  beta0true<-c(1.0,0.8,0.6,0,0,0)
  y<-x%*%beta0true+e
  samp<-list(x=x,y=y)
  return(samp)
}
faic<-function(n,x,y,beta,k)
{
  SSeq<-t(y-x%*%beta)%*%(y-x%*%beta)
  aicn<-k*log(SSeq)+2*n
  return(aicn)
}
fbic<-function(n,x,y,beta,k)
{
  SSeq<-t(y-x%*%beta)%*%(y-x%*%beta)
  bicn<-k*log(SSeq)+n/k*log(k)
  return(bicn)
}
flasso<-function(x,y,k)
{
  lambda<-seq(0.01,1,0.01)
  m1<-matrix(rep(0,100),6,100) ####生成一个矩阵，存放所有beta的结果
  gcv<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100) ####生成一个矩阵，存放所有GCV的结果
  aic1<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100)####生成一个矩阵，存放所有AIC的结果
  bic1<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100)####生成一个矩阵，存放所有BIC的结果
  for (i in 1:100)  
  { 
    lam<-lambda[i] 
    beta0<-(solve(t(x)%*%x)%*%t(x))%*%y
    a<-matrix(rep(0,6),6,1) 
    while(t(beta0-a)%*%(beta0-a)>10^-5)  ####收敛条件:直到前后两次迭代结果小于10^-5，停止循环
    { 
      bet<-matrix(rep(0,6),6,1) 
      for(j in 1:6)
      { 
        if(abs(beta0[j,1]<1e-4)) 
        {
            beta0[j,1]<-10^-5
        }
        bet[j,1]<-1/abs(beta0[j,1])
      }####如果beta0中某分量的值太小，则它的倒数取为10^5
      beta11<-beta0-solve((t(x)%*%x)+k*lam*diag(c(bet)))%*%((-t(x))%*%(y-x%*%beta0)+k*lam*diag(c(bet))%*%beta0)
      for(g in 1:6)
      { 
        if(abs(beta11[g,1])<0.1)
          beta11[g,1]<-0 
      } 
      a<-beta0;
      beta0<-beta11; 
    }
    m1[,i]<-beta0
    bet<-beta0
    for (l in 1:6)
    { 
      if (abs(beta0[l,1]<10^-4)) 
        bet[l,1]<-10^-5
    } 
    p<-x%*%solve((t(x)%*%x)+k*lam*diag(c(bet)))%*%t(x)
    tr<-sum(diag(p)) 
    t1<-t(y-x%*%beta0)%*%(y-x%*%beta0) 
    gcv[1,i]<-(t(y-x%*%beta0))%*%(y-x%*%beta0)/(1-tr/k)^2
    n=sum(ifelse(m1[,i]>1e-5,1,0))
    aic1[1,i]<-faic(n,x,y,m1[,i],k)
    bic1[1,i]<-fbic(n,x,y,m1[,i],k)
  }
  gcvmin<-which.min(gcv)
  aicmin<-which.min(aic1)
  bicmin<-which.min(bic1)
  betagcv<-m1[,gcvmin]
  betaaic<-m1[,aicmin]
  betabic<-m1[,bicmin]
  return(list(betagcv=betagcv,betaaic=betaaic,betabic=betabic,gcvmin=gcvmin,aicmin=aicmin,bicmin=bicmin))
}
falasso<-function(x,y,k)
{
  betals<-solve(t(x)%*%x)%*%t(x)%*%y
  lambda<-seq(0.01,1,0.01)
  m2<-matrix(rep(0,100),6,100) ####生成一个矩阵，存放所有beta的结果
  gcv2<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100) ####生成一个矩阵，存放所有GCV的结果
  aic2<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100)####生成一个矩阵，存放所有AIC的结果
  bic2<-matrix(rep(0,100),1,100)####生成一个矩阵，存放所有BIC的结果
  for (i in 1:100)  
  { 
    lam<-lambda[i] 
    beta0<-(solve(t(x)%*%x)%*%t(x))%*%y
    a<-matrix(rep(0,6),6,1) 
    while(t(beta0-a)%*%(beta0-a)>10^-5)
    { 
      bet<-matrix(rep(0,6),6,1) 
      for(j in 1:6)
      { 
        if(abs(beta0[j,1]<1e-4)) 
        {
          beta0[j,1]<-10^-5
        }
        bet[j,1]<-1/abs(beta0[j,1])
      } 
      beta11<-beta0-solve((t(x)%*%x)+k*lam*diag(c(bet/betals)))%*%((-t(x))%*%(y-x%*%beta0)+k*lam*diag(c(bet/betals))%*%beta0)
      for(g in 1:6)
      { 
        if(abs(beta11[g,1])<0.1)
          beta11[g,1]<-0 
      } 
      a<-beta0;
      beta0<-beta11; 
    }
    m2[,i]<-beta0
    bet<-beta0
    for (l in 1:6)
    { 
      if (abs(beta0[l,1]<10^-4)) 
        bet[l,1]<-10^-5
    } 
    p<-x%*%solve((t(x)%*%x)+100*lam*diag(c(bet)))%*%t(x)
    tr<-sum(diag(p)) 
    t1<-t(y-x%*%beta0)%*%(y-x%*%beta0) 
    gcv2[1,i]<-(t(y-x%*%beta0))%*%(y-x%*%beta0)/(1-tr/100)^2
    n=sum(ifelse(m2[,i]>1e-5,1,0))
    aic2[1,i]<-faic(n,x,y,m2[,i],k)
    bic2[1,i]<-fbic(n,x,y,m2[,i],k)
  }
  gcvmin2<-which.min(gcv2)
  aicmin2<-which.min(aic2)
  bicmin2<-which.min(bic2)
  betagcv2<-m2[,gcvmin2]
  betaaic2<-m2[,aicmin2]
  betabic2<-m2[,bicmin2]
  return(list(betagcv2=betagcv2,betaaic2=betaaic2,betabic2=betabic2,aicmin2=aicmin2,bicmin2=bicmin2,gcvmin2=gcvmin2))
}
fsubsetbic<-function(x,y,n)
{
  q<-1
  s<-combn(c(1:6),1)#####从6个变量中选出1个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(6,n,1))#####产生1个6*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta1<-matrix(0,6,6)
  BIC1<-c()
  for(i in 1:6){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]])
    xq<-m[i,,]######只用一个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    BIC1[i]<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
    betta1[i,i]<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
  }
  betta1
  BIC1
  ####两个变量求BIC
  q<-2
  s<-combn(c(1:6),2)######从6个变量中选出2个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(15,n,2))#####产生2个15*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  BIC2<-c()
  betta2<-matrix(0,6,15)
  for(i in 1:15){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]])
    xq<-m[i,,]######用两个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    BIC2[i]<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta2[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta2[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
  }
  BIC2
  betta2
  ######三个变量求BIC
  q<-3
  s<-combn(c(1:6),3)######从6个变量中选出3个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(20,n,3))#####产生3个20*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta3<-matrix(0,6,20)
  BIC3<-c()
  for(i in 1:20){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]],x[,s[3,i]])
    xq<-m[i,,]####选三个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    BIC3[i]<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta3[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta3[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta3[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
  }
  betta3
  BIC3
  ####四个变量求BIC
  q<-4
  s<-combn(c(1:6),4)######从6个变量中选出4个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(15,n,4))#####产生4个15*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta4<-matrix(0,6,15)
  BIC4<-c()
  for(i in 1:15){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]],x[,s[3,i]],x[,s[4,i]])
    xq<-m[i,,]####选四个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    BIC4[i]<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta4[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta4[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta4[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
    betta4[s[4,i],i]<-p[4,1]
  }
  BIC4
  betta4
  ####5个变量求BIC
  q<-5
  BIC5<-c()
  s<-combn(c(1:6),5)
  betta5<-matrix(0,6,6)
  for(i in 1:6){
    xq<-x[,-i]
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    BIC5[i]<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta5[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta5[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta5[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
    betta5[s[4,i],i]<-p[4,1]
    betta5[s[5,i],i]<-p[5,1]
  }
  BIC5
  betta5
  #####6个变量求BIC
  q<-6
  xq<-x
  SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
  BIC6<-log(SSeq/n)+q/n*log(n)
  betta6<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
  betta6
  BIC6
  
  betta<-matrix(c(betta1,betta2,betta3,betta4,betta5,betta6),6,63)
  BIC<-c(BIC1,BIC2,BIC3,BIC4,BIC5,BIC6)
  t<-which.min(BIC)
  betabic<-betta[,t]
  return(betabic)
}
fsubsetaic=function(x,y,n)
{
  q<-1
  betta1<-matrix(0,6,6)
  s<-combn(c(1:6),1)#####从6个变量中选出1个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(6,n,1))#####产生6个n*1所有元素都是0的矩阵
  AIC1<-c()
  for(i in 1:6){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]])######只用一个变量的xq
    xq<-m[i,,]
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    AIC1[i]<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q####计算AIC
    betta1[i,i]<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
  }
  AIC1
  betta1
  ####两个变量求AIC
  q<-2
  s<-combn(c(1:6),2)#####从6个变量中选出2个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(15,n,2))#####产生2个15*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta2<-matrix(0,6,15)
  AIC2<-c()
  for(i in 1:15){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]])#####两个变量的xq
    xq<-m[i,,]
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    AIC2[i]<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta2[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta2[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
  }
  AIC2
  betta2
  ####三个变量求AIC
  q<-3
  s<-combn(c(1:6),3)#####从6个变量中选出3个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(20,n,3))#####产生3个20*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta3<-matrix(0,6,20)
  AIC3<-c()
  for(i in 1:20){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]],x[,s[3,i]])#####三个变量的xq
    xq<-m[i,,]
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    AIC3[i]<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta3[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta3[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta3[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
  }
  AIC3
  betta3
  #####四个变量求AIC
  q<-4
  s<-combn(c(1:6),4)#####从6个变量中选出4个的所有可能结果
  m<-array(0,dim<-c(15,n,4))#####产生4个15*n所有元素都是0的矩阵
  betta4<-matrix(0,6,15)
  AIC4<-c()
  for(i in 1:15){
    m[i, , ]<-cbind(x[,s[1,i]],x[,s[2,i]],x[,s[3,i]],x[,s[4,i]])
    xq<-m[i,,]#####四个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    AIC4[i]<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta4[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta4[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta4[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
    betta4[s[4,i],i]<-p[4,1]
  }
  AIC4
  betta4
  #####5个变量求AIC
  q<-5
  AIC5<-c()
  s<-combn(c(1:6),5)#####从6个变量中选出5个的所有可能结果
  betta5<-matrix(0,6,6)
  for(i in 1:6){
    xq<-x[,-i]####5个变量的xq
    SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
    AIC5[i]<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q
    p<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
    betta5[s[1,i],i]<-p[1,1]
    betta5[s[2,i],i]<-p[2,1]
    betta5[s[3,i],i]<-p[3,1]
    betta5[s[4,i],i]<-p[4,1]
    betta5[s[5,i],i]<-p[5,1]
  }
  AIC5
  betta5
  ######6个变量求AIC
  q<-6
  xq<-x####6个变量的xq
  SSeq<-t(y)%*%(diag(n)-xq%*%solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq))%*%y
  AIC6<-n*log(SSeq)+2*q
  betta6<-solve(t(xq)%*%xq)%*%t(xq)%*%y
  betta6
  AIC6
  
  betta<-matrix(c(betta1,betta2,betta3,betta4,betta5,betta6),6,63)
  AIC<-c(AIC1,AIC2,AIC3,AIC4,AIC5,AIC6)#####所有的AIC结果
  t<-which.min(AIC)####找出最小的AIC对应的组合
  betaaic<-betta[,t]####输出beta
  return(betaaic)
}
fdo<-function(t)
{
  corlassoaic=0
  corlassobic=0
  corlassogcv=0
  coralassoaic=0
  coralassobic=0
  coralassogcv=0
  corsubaic=0
  corsubbic=0
  incorlassoaic=0
  incorlassobic=0
  incorlassogcv=0
  incoralassoaic=0
  incoralassobic=0
  incoralassogcv=0
  incorsubaic=0
  incorsubbic=0
  eq1=0
  eq1i=c()
  eq1betabic<-matrix(rep(0,120),6,20)
  eq1betagcv<-matrix(rep(0,120),6,20)
  eq2=0
  eq2i=c()
  eq2betabic<-matrix(rep(0,120),6,20)
  eq2betagcv<-matrix(rep(0,120),6,20)
  eqal=list(eq1=eq1,eq1i=eq1i,eq1betabic=eq1betabic,eq1betagcv=eq1betagcv)
  eqgg=list(eq2=eq2,eq2i=eq2i,eq2betabic=eq2betabic,eq2betagcv=eq2betagcv)
  for(i in 1:1000)
  {
    data<-fdata(i,t)
    lassores<-flasso(data$x,data$y,t)
    lassoaicres<-lassores$betaaic
    lassobicres<-lassores$betabic
    lassogcvres<-lassores$betagcv
    alassores<-falasso(data$x,data$y,t)
    alassoaicres<-alassores$betaaic2
    alassobicres<-alassores$betabic2
    alassogcvres<-alassores$betagcv2
    alssominbic<-alassores$bicmin2
    alssomingcv<-alassores$gcvmin2
    subaicres<-fsubsetaic(data$x,data$y,t)
    subbicres<-fsubsetbic(data$x,data$y,t)
    if(lassoaicres[4]==0&&lassoaicres[5]==0&&lassoaicres[6]==0)
    {
      corlassoaic=corlassoaic+1
    }
    if(lassoaicres[1]==0|lassoaicres[2]==0|lassoaicres[3]==0)
    {
      incorlassoaic=incorlassoaic+1
    }
    if(lassobicres[4]==0&&lassobicres[5]==0&&lassobicres[6]==0)
    {
      corlassobic=corlassobic+1
    }
    if(lassobicres[1]==0|lassobicres[2]==0|lassobicres[3]==0)
    {
      incorlassobic=incorlassobic+1
    }
    if(lassogcvres[4]==0&&lassogcvres[5]==0&&lassogcvres[6]==0)
    {
      corlassogcv=corlassogcv+1
    }
    if(lassogcvres[1]==0|lassogcvres[2]==0|lassogcvres[3]==0)
    {
      incorlassogcv=incorlassogcv+1
    }
    if(alassoaicres[4]==0&&alassoaicres[5]==0&&alassoaicres[6]==0)
    {
      coralassoaic=coralassoaic+1
    }
    if(alassoaicres[1]==0|alassoaicres[2]==0|alassoaicres[3]==0)
    {
      incoralassoaic=incoralassoaic+1
    }
    if(alassobicres[4]==0&&alassobicres[5]==0&&alassobicres[6]==0)
    {
      coralassobic=coralassobic+1
    }
    if(alassobicres[1]==0|alassobicres[2]==0|alassobicres[3]==0)
    {
      incoralassobic=incoralassobic+1
    }
    if(alassogcvres[4]==0&&alassogcvres[5]==0&&alassogcvres[6]==0)
    {
      coralassogcv=coralassogcv+1
    }
    if(alassogcvres[1]==0|alassogcvres[2]==0|alassogcvres[3]==0)
    {
      incoralassogcv=incoralassogcv+1
    }
    if(subbicres[4]==0&&subbicres[5]==0&&subbicres[6]==0)
    {
      corsubbic=corsubbic+1
    }
    if(subbicres[1]==0|subbicres[2]==0|subbicres[3]==0)
    {
      incorsubbic=incorsubbic+1
    }
    if(subaicres[4]==0&&subaicres[5]==0&&subaicres[6]==0)
    {
      corsubaic=corsubaic+1
    }
    if(subaicres[1]==0|subaicres[2]==0|subaicres[3]==0)
    {
      incorsubaic=incorsubaic+1
    }
    if(coralassobic==coralassogcv&&alssominbic==alssomingcv&&i<=20)
    {
      eqal$eq1=eqal$eq1+1
      eqal$eq1i=c(eqal$eq1i,i)
      eqal$eq1betabic[,i]=matrix(alassores$betabic2,6,1)
      eqal$eq1betagcv[,i]=matrix(alassores$betagcv2,6,1)
    }
    if(corlassogcv==coralassogcv)
    {
      eqgg$eq2=eqal$eq2+1
      eqgg$eq2i=c(eqgg$eq2i,i)
      eqgg$eq2betabic[,i]=matrix(alassores$betabic2,6,1)
      eqgg$eq2betagcv[,i]=matrix(alassores$betagcv2,6,1)
    }
  }
  correct=as.matrix(c(corlassoaic,corlassobic,coralassogcv,coralassoaic,coralassobic,coralassogcv,corsubaic,corsubbic))
  incorrect=as.matrix(c(incorlassoaic,incorlassobic,incoralassogcv,incoralassoaic,incoralassobic,incoralassogcv,incorsubaic,incorsubbic))
  res<-data.frame(correct,incorrect)
  rownames(res)<-c("lassoaic","lassobic","lassogcv","adaptive lassoaic","adaptive lassobic","adaptive lassogcv","subsetaic","subsetbic")
  resu<-list(res=res,eqal=eqal,eqgg=eqgg)
}
finalres100<-fdo(100)
finalres200<-fdo(200)
finalres500<-fdo(500)
finalres100
finalres200
finalres500

```
